gt_sql: SELECT translation FROM set_translations WHERE setCode IN ( SELECT code FROM sets WHERE name = 'Mirrodin' ) AND language = 'Chinese Simplified'
pred_sql:
SELECT st.translation
FROM set_translations st
JOIN sets s ON st.setCode = s.code
WHERE s.name = 'Mirrodin' AND st.language = 'Chinese Simplified';
question: Show the Simplified Chinese translation of the name of the set "Mirrodin"?
